---
title: "Stories for the Saints’ Days"
---

## Stories for the Saints’ Days

**Author:** Susanna Warren
**Date:** 1873
**Imprint:** London: SPCK

### Notes

This appeared under the initials \'S.W.\'.  It had originally been published in the <i>Monthly Paper of Sunday Teaching</i>.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
